    <h1 {...{
      "id": "liveactivityattributes"
    }}>{`LiveActivityAttributes`}</h1>
    <p>{`A protocol that enables Live Activities to integrate with Adobe Experience Platform.`}</p>
    <p>{`Conforming types can associate required Adobe Experience Platform data with iOS Live Activities. Any custom `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ActivityAttributes`}</inlineCode>{` struct must implement this protocol when registering a Live Activity with the SDK.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "ios-protocol---liveactivityattributes"
    }}>{`iOS Protocol - LiveActivityAttributes`}</h2>
    <p>{`Available in iOS 16.1 and later.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "requirements"
    }}>{`Requirements`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "liveactivitydata"
    }}>{`liveActivityData`}</h3>
    <p>{`The Adobe Experience Platform data associated with the Live Activity.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`var liveActivityData: LiveActivityData { get }
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`This property must return a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`LiveActivityData`}</inlineCode>{` instance containing either a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`liveActivityID`}</inlineCode>{` for individual Live Activities or a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`channelID`}</inlineCode>{` for broadcast Live Activities.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "usage"
    }}>{`Usage`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "basic-implementation"
    }}>{`Basic implementation`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`@available(iOS 16.1, *)
struct FoodDeliveryLiveActivityAttributes: LiveActivityAttributes {
    // Required: AEP Integration Data
    var liveActivityData: LiveActivityData
    
    // Static attributes: Custom properties that do not change
    var restaurantName: String
    
    // Dynamic content state: Data that can be updated
    struct ContentState: Codable, Hashable {
        var orderStatus: String
    }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "registration"
    }}>{`Registration`}</h3>
    <p>{`After defining your attributes, register the Live Activity type with the SDK:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`if #available(iOS 16.1, *) {
    Messaging.registerLiveActivities([FoodDeliveryLiveActivityAttributes.self])
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`To register multiple Live Activity types at once:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`if #available(iOS 16.1, *) {
    Messaging.registerLiveActivities([
        FoodDeliveryLiveActivityAttributes.self,
        GameScoreLiveActivityAttributes.self
    ])
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "creating-a-live-activity"
    }}>{`Creating a Live Activity`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`let attributes = FoodDeliveryLiveActivityAttributes(
    liveActivityData: LiveActivityData(liveActivityID: "order123"),
    restaurantName: "Pizza Palace"
)

let contentState = FoodDeliveryLiveActivityAttributes.ContentState(
    orderStatus: "Ordered"
)

let activity = try Activity<FoodDeliveryLiveActivityAttributes>.request(
    attributes: attributes,
    contentState: contentState,
    pushType: .token
)
`}</code></pre>
